calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Douglas Applegate for Kemp & Associates, Assignee (via Zoom).
Ronald Berman for Albert Olorvida, Petitioner (via Zoom).

Discussion was held regarding the Examiner's notes. Mr. Berman acknowledged omission of an assignment from Dalia Encarnacion and informed the court that he had submitted a filing this morning to address. The petitioner agreed that an unsupported amount of $247 from the proposed order should be stricken, as he could not find any justification for it being included.

The court requested a revised proposed order to address the shares of two missing beneficiaries, Maria Aquiles and Christian Olorvida. Mr. Applegate confirmed he provided necessary information to Mr. Berman to update the order. Mr. Berman agreed to draft and submit the revised order for approval.

The court said that it was not concerned about the fee paid to the third party to recoup the student account and agreed to allow it.

The court took the petition under submission with intent to:
-settle and allow the final account,
-accept small estate affidavits on file to allow final distribution of Azuceno Olorvida's post deceased 1/60 share to his children Albert and Arnold,
-allow the scheduled proposed distributions attached to the second supplement, except as to Azuceno Olorviada's share (pending further determination),
-strike Kemp & Associates 1/960 share for Christian Olorvida,
-credit and include assignment for Dalia Encarnacion.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-14-2024 Continued To Dec-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ron Berman appeared by zoom for administrator.

Mr. Berman stated that the only thing they are waiting for is a small estate affidavit from the administrator's brother, that they should get it any day now according to the brother, that he thought the $500.00 discrepancy was addressed in his supplement and that he will check and make sure that it is addressed. The Second and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is continued to December 18, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Saenz. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-12-2024 Continued To Oct-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ron Berman appeared by zoom for petitioner.
Douglas Applegate appeared by zoom for Kemp & Associates.

The court stated that it read the supplemental filings and that it is taking the order to show cause off calendar based on the progress that it sees. The court also stated that a small estate affidavit from the successors of Azuceno Olorvida needs to be prepared and must be conventionally filed with a certified copy of the death certificate with an apostille if Azuceno died in the Philippines, that it does not look like Azuceno or his successors did an assignment and that it is the responsibility of the successors and the administrator to prepare and file the affidavit. Mr. Berman requested a two-month continuance. Mr. Applegate stated that he needs to know what the mechanism will be to reconcile schedule E. The Second and Final Account and Report of Administrator and Petition for Settlement Thereof, etc. is continued to October 14, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-12-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-10-2024 Continued To Aug-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ronald Berman appeared by zoom for petitioner.
Douglas Applegate appeared by zoom for Kemp & Associates (partial assignee).

The court noted that there are multiple issues that were raised by the probate examiner that have not been addressed. Discussion was held about there being tons of beneficiaries for which they are trying to get the appropriate documentation for, this being complicated because all of the beneficiaries are overseas, the supplemental declaration that was filed by Mr. Applegate on March 18, 2024, Mr. Applegate having created a spread sheet/draft with numbers, Mr. Applegate's position that 90% of the issues have been addressed, etc. The court informed counsel that the best way to advise the examiner as to what has been done is by way of a declaration. The court will issue an order to show cause for Mr. Applegate and Mr. Berman to go down the list to address all of items that are in the tentative rulings or they will face sanctions in the amount of $250.00 against each one of them. The order to show cause is set for August 12, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Second and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is also continued to August 12, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Malone/Santos. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ronald Berman, via Zoom, for Albert Olorvida, Administrator.

The court notes that Mr. Applegate is not present at today's hearing. Mr. Berman reports receiving notice from him yesterday evening advising that he has been in-and-out of the hospital recently and would not be present today. The court notes that Mr. Applegate has not responded to the Examiner's notes for several months now.

After additional discussion, the Petition to Determine Heirship is taken off calendar. The Accounting Petition is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Obitinalla. Not reported.

Petition For Determination Of Heirship
Off Calendar Feb-09-2022 Continued To Mar-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Douglas Applegate appeared by zoom for Kemp & Associates (petitioner).

The court questions why the delay in addressing the issues raised in the tentative ruling of last November. Mr. Applegate stated that his client has located additional heirs, that the petition needs to be amended and service has to be made on the new parties which is a complicated process, and that he had emergency surgery in December and has recently recovered. Mr. Applegate also stated that he spoke with the administrator's attorney and that all of the parties agree that it makes to continue this matter to the same hearing date on the accounting (March 14th) which will give him enough time to amend the petition and provide notice. The Petition for Determination of Heirship is continued to March 22, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Applegate will communicate with the Probate Examiner about continuing the accounting petition.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Account From Jan-16-2012 To Jan-15-2016
Off Calendar Aug-17-2021 Continued To Oct-05-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ronald Berman appeared by zoom for Administrator.
Douglas Applegate appeared by zoom for Kemp & Associates.

The Court noted that a four-year accounting has been ordered. Mr. Berman stated that this a little odd since the letters were issued in October 2018. The Court stated that it is looking for an accounting from the date of death through January 2016. Mr. Berman stated that the funds were with the State of California the whole time as they were escheated funds. The Court stated that if information can't be readily available, Mr. Berman is to give some supporting facts and inform the Court of what's going on. Mr. Berman stated that they need to do a petition to determine heirs. Status of account from January 16, 2012 to January 15, 2016 is continued to October 5, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ronald Berman, via ZOOM, specially appearing for Kenneth Schwartz, counsel for Albert Olorvida, Personal Representative.

The court queries counsel at the outset regarding how much time he will need to file a two-year accounting from 1/16/2012 to 1/15/2014, assuming that he will not be able to obtain 33 waivers of accounting. Counsel reports that it will be difficult to obtain bank statements going back that far. The court then queries counsel regarding whether bank accounts have been escheated. Counsel reports that he does not have records regarding any escheated accounts. Counsel goes on to report that there had been a real property which had been sold about 4 to 6 months ago but that there were many issues prior to that which prevented the sale of the property including issues with squatters. After additional discussion, the court advises counsel that it will be ordering a four-year accounting from 1/16/2012 to 1/15/2016.

The Accounting Status Petition is taken under submission. A Status of Four-Year Accounting is set for August 17, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
